selected_next_mission.title: S10 — Assistant Optimization Layer
selected_next_mission.purpose: Optimize the assistant/operator layer so ChatGPT uses the S9 one-drop rail with better context loading, tool planning, recovery, proof reasoning, low-attention operation, handoff quality, read-only verification, and self-audit.

next_action: Complete and merge the S10 setup docs PR, then start S10 implementation from current main using docs/PROMPTS/S10_IMPLEMENTATION_PROMPT.md.
do_not_reopen: S9 One-Drop Build Accelerator naming and purpose
S10 Assistant Optimization Layer naming and purpose
safety_boundary: Future work must remain public-safe unless explicitly approved. S10 setup is docs/state/prompt only and must not implement S10 runtime/contracts in this branch.
resume_prompt: Resume StealthEye Cloud from current main if S10 setup is merged. S0-S9 are merged green. S10 is selected as Assistant Optimization Layer. No S10 implementation has started. Start S10 on build/s10-assistant-optimization-layer using docs/PROMPTS/S10_IMPLEMENTATION_PROMPT.md.
